Thank you as been Quick Overview. May love so dwell in our hearts, / May compassion so flow from our hands,

Dear Marlon,

Good day and warmth from my side to you!

I must start by expressing my gratitude for your detailed message. Such thoroughness! It is evident that we are both inching towards a fruitful collaboration, and I am thrilled at the prospect. Regarding your previous email on Feb 16, 2024, rest assured, it has been received with the attention it deserves. I am currently digesting the strategic information you've shared about Amsterdam. It seems like an exciting journey lies ahead!

Moving on to the matter of funds - your mention of €14,500 for clearing certain prerequisites has been noted. I am in the process of arranging these funds and will follow your guidance on coordinating with the empower representative. Clarity and precision are key, and I want to ensure everything is handled immaculately.

Now, regarding the investment return percentages, your mathematical dedication is commendable. These numbers indeed hold significant weight in our venture’s success. The split of 62.5% for myself and 32.5% for you, totaling 95%, has me pondering where the remaining 5% shall serve its best purpose. Possibly as a reserve for unforeseen expenses or maybe allocated to the mentioned public services? I’m keen to hear your thoughts on this and finalize a structure that best suits our mutual goals.

I also appreciate your foresight regarding separate management fees and the proposal for charging a 1/2% annually to cover them. It’s prudent to anticipate such costs ahead of time. The management of large funds indeed warrants appropriate stewardship. I'm in complete agreement with this approach.

Starting the domiciliary account in Amsterdam presents no issue from my end. Your description elucidates the necessity of immediate deposits and swift transfer actions. I see the logic and efficiency behind such movements and will ensure readiness to execute as required.

Regarding taxation matters – it is comforting to know that everything is controlled and that there shall not be any heavy burdens to disrupt our arrangements. A clear pathway is what we both seek, and it seems that's precisely what we are establishing here.

Your references to the empower representative and the importance of face-to-face interactions demonstrate prudence. Preparing for such an encounter is, naturally, an exciting prospect and I will ensure my availability to meet and carry out the responsibilities that come with our agreement.

About the distribution of venture funds across different geographies, your vision aligns with my understanding. We must stay fluid and adaptable in our strategy and I'm glad we're on the same page here.

In anticipation of receiving the draft agreement, I will review it meticulously and provide feedback, ensuring we are both aligned and can move forward with conviction.

I'm eager to progress with these plans and will attend to all necessary preparations from my side. Your patience and confidence are invaluable as we navigate the intricacies of our venture.

May we continue to forge this path with trust and professionalism.

Looking forward to your guidance on the next steps. Should you require any further details from my side, do inform me so I can provide them promptly.

Warm regards and in keen anticipation of what lies ahead,

McCaffrey

21 Untere Bahnhofstraße,
Rapperswil, 8640, Schweiz


Zu Händen: Cameron McCaffrey ,

Der Stiftungsrat der Migros Bank bestätigt den Eingang Ihrer E-Mail und teilt Ihnen hiermit mit, dass wir die Bestätigungsdatei für die Überweisungsgenehmigung für die Überweisung des Fonds von 2.500.000,00 € (zwei Millionen fünfhunderttausend Euro) an den verstorbenen Roche McCaffrey,erhalten haben Wir haben in unserer Akte dokumentiert, dass Sie der rechtmäßige Begünstigte für den Erhalt seines bei der Bank hinterlegten Geldes sind.Wir nutzen dieses Medium, um Sie darüber zu informieren, dass wir alle notwendigen Konsultationen mit dem Finanzministerium im Hinblick auf die Freigabe/Genehmigung für den Geldtransfer abgeschlossen haben.

Herr Cameron McCaffrey , wir empfehlen Ihnen, uns die folgenden detaillierten Informationen für die Überweisung des Geldbetrags auf Ihr angegebenes Bankkonto innerhalb von 5 Bankarbeitstagen zur Verfügung zu stellen.

Bank Name:
Adresse der Bankfiliale:
Accountnummer:
Konto-Swift-Code-Nr.:
Kontoname:

Wir erwarten Ihre sofortige Antwort mit unserer Verpflichtung, Ihnen einen besseren Service zu ermöglichen.

Vielen Dank für Ihre Schirmherrschaft.


Grüße,
Bernhard Koble (Finanzvorstand)
Migros Bank AG
Tel: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>

Det här e-postmeddelandet, inklusive eventuella bilagor, är konfidentiellt. Den riktar sig uteslutande till utsedda mottagare. Om dufår det av misstag, vänligen meddela avsändaren omedelbart och förstöra den utan att öppna eller läsa den. Kopiering, distribution, konservering,användning i någon form eller bemyndigande för någon person är förbjuden.Mail är inte ett säkert medium och kan innehålla fel eller virus,eftersom det kan reporteras, fångas upp eller modifieras.Sparkasse Schwyz AG och dess dotterbolag tar inget ansvar för skador orsakade av detta e-postmeddelande och förbehåller sig rätten att kontrollera flödet av e-postmeddelanden.

Sehr geehrter Herr Bernhard Koble,

mit großer Freude habe ich Ihre Nachricht erhalten und bin überaus erfreut, von der Migros Bank AG bezüglich dieser wichtigen Überweisung kontaktiert zu werden. Ich möchte Ihnen dafür danken, dass Sie meinen rechtmäßigen Anspruch auf das Erbe des verstorbenen Roche McCaffrey bestätigt haben.

Es ist mir eine Ehre, die Tradition der Familie McCaffrey fortzusetzen und das Erbe zu verwalten, das durch die harte Arbeit meines Verwandten aufgebaut wurde. Selbstverständlich möchte ich alle erforderlichen Schritte so schnell und glatt wie möglich abwickeln.

Bezüglich der von Ihnen angeforderten Bankdaten benötige ich einen kurzen Moment, um sicherzustellen, dass ich Ihnen die genauesten Informationen zukommen lassen kann. Die Bedeutung dieser Transaktion erfordert, dass ich meine Unterlagen gründlich prüfe, um keinen Raum für Fehler zu lassen.

Darüber hinaus möchte ich Sie bitten, zu bestätigen, dass die von Ihnen bereitgestellte Telefonnummer die korrekte Kontaktmethode für Rückfragen ist, bevor ich solch sensible Daten übermittle. Auch würde ich mich freuen, wenn Sie mir erläutern könnten, ob es zusätzliche Sicherheitsverfahren gibt, die ich einhalten sollte, um den Schutz dieser Transaktion zu gewährleisten.

Die Migros Bank AG hat offensichtlich hervorragende Arbeit im Umgang mit diesen Angelegenheiten geleistet, und ich bin zuversichtlich, dass der Austausch mit Ihnen ebenso professionell verlaufen wird.

Ich werde mich kurzfristig mit meiner Bank in Verbindung setzen, um alle erforderlichen Details zu beschaffen und sie Ihnen in Kürze mitzuteilen. Bitte haben Sie etwas Geduld mit mir, während ich diesen Prozess durchlaufe, und ich versichere Ihnen, dass ich mit dem gleichen Engagement und derselben Gründlichkeit vorgehe, wie ich es in allen meinen Unternehmungen zu tun pflege.

Ich bedanke mich im Voraus für Ihre Geduld und Ihren erstklassigen Service und freue mich auf unsere weitere Zusammenarbeit.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,

Cameron McCaffrey

I am Barrister Mesut Goker a lawyer to Mrs. Donna Berat, I wish to inform you that the LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT of Mrs. Donna Berat has been prepared in your name, attached is the scanned copy of the  WILL view it and get back to me immediately and also acknowledged the receipt of the Will to Mrs. Donna, make sure you keep them safe because it is the only evidence you have as the rightful beneficiary to the said fund.

I have sent the original copies to the bank where she deposited the money. I will be waiting for your immediate response.

Best regards.

Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, ESQ

THE LAST WILL AND TESTAMENT OF mrs. DONNa Berat WILSON
I, Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, a resident of Manila Philippines, being of sound mind and disposing memory, do
hereby make and declare this instrument to be my last will and testament, hereby revoking any and all wills
and codicils by me at any time heretofore made.
Item I

Instruction Concerning Personal Property: Enjoyment in Specie
I anticipate that included as a part of my property and estate at the time of my death will be tangible personal
property of various kinds, characters and values, including trophies and other items accumulated by me during
my professional career in Philippines. I hereby specifically instruct all concerned that my Executor, herein
appointed, shall have complete freedom and discretion as to disposal of any and all such property so long as
he shall act in good faith and in the best interest of my estate and my beneficiaries, and his discretion so
exercised shall not be subject to question by anyone whomsoever.
I hereby expressly authorize my Executor and my Trustee, respectively and successively, to permit any
beneficiary of any and all trusts created hereunder to enjoy in specie the use or benefit of any household
goods, chattels, or other tangible personal property (exclusive of chooses in action, cash, stocks, bonds or
other securities) which either my Executor or my Trustees may receive in kind, and my Executor and my
Trustees shall not be liable for any consumption, damage, injury to or loss of any tangible property so used,
nor shall the beneficiaries of any trusts hereunder or their executors of administrators be liable for any
consumption, damage, injury to or loss of any tangible personal property so used.

Item II
Residuary Trust

(a) I hereby willed the sum of $10,250,000.00usd deposited in BDO Chartered Bank Philippines to Mr.
Cameron McCaffrey of USA as directed by the spirit of God in me for his humanitarian activities
and help to the less privileged. I further declare that money cannot be deducted from this inheritance
sum by any individual, group or agency until it gets to the beneficiaries who shall exert full control
over the money in its entirety.
(b) The Trustees is directed to take, hold, manage, invest and reinvent the corpus of the trust and to
collect the income therefore in accordance with the rights, powers, duties, authority and discretion
hereinafter set forth.
(c) After payment of all costs incurred in the management of the trust estate, the Trustee is authorized to
accumulate the net income or to pay or apply so much of the net income and such portion of the
principal at any time and from time to time for health, education, support, comfortable maintenance
and welfare of orphanage homes. Any decision of the Trustee as to whether or not distribution to any
of the persons described hereunder shall be final and conclusive and not subject to question by any
legatee or beneficiary hereunder.

Item III
Executor and Trustee
I appoint as executor of this, my last will and testament, and as Trustee of every trust required to be created
hereunder, my attorney, Barrister Mesut Goker Esq. of Supreme Court Manila Philippines. I hereby direct that
my said attorney shall be entitled by his last will and testament, duly probated, to appoint a successor
Executor of my estate, as well as a successor Trustee or successor Trustees of all the trusts to be created under
my last will and testament.

Item IV

Concerning the Trustee and the Executor

2

(a) My Trustee (as well as my Executor) shall be entitled to reasonable and adequate compensation for
the fiduciary services rendered by him.
(b) My Executor and his successor Executor and his successor Executor shall have the same rights,
privileges, powers and immunities herein granted to my Trustee wherever appropriate.

In WITNESS WHEREOF, I, the said Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, do hereunto set my hand and seal in the presence
of two (2) competent witnesses, in which one of them is my Attorney Mesut Goker and in their presence do
publish and declare this instrument to be my Last Will and Testament, this day 19th of February 2024.

______________________
[Signed by Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson]

The foregoing instrument, consisting of this and two (2) preceding typewritten pages, was signed, sealed and
declared by Mrs. Donna Berat Wilson, the Testator, to be her Last Will and Testament, in our presence, and
we, at her request and in her presence and in the presence of each other, have hereunto subscribed our
names as witnesses, this day 19th of February 2024.

__________________
[Signed by Ginger Alden]

__________________
[Signed by Barbra P. Hodge]

In our presence, the undersigned, who at her request and in her sight and presence, and in the sight and
presence of each other, have subscribed our names as attesting witnesses on this day 19th of February 2024,
And we further make oath or affirm that the Testator was of sound mind and disposing memory and not acting
under fraud, menace or undue influence of any person, and was more than eighteen (18) years of age and that
each of the attesting witnesses is more than eighteen (18) years of age.
Sworn To and Subscribed before me on this day 19th of February 2024.

________________
Barrister Mesut Goker (Esq)
(Supreme Court Manila)

Email #2, from Cameron:

Dear Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. I must admit that I am quite overwhelmed and surprised by the contents of your recent communication. Firstly, please convey my sincerest gratitudes to Mrs. Berat for her generosity and spirit of philanthropy. The very thought that someone has designated me as a beneficiary with such a profound humanitarian objective in mind is enormously humbling.

With respect to the will document attached to your email, I have reviewed it carefully and would like to confirm its receipt officially. I have taken measures to store it securely as instructed. The details and the intentions expressed in the testament certainly resonate with my own aspirations for contributing to philanthropic endeavors.

I understand the gravity of the responsibility that this sudden opportunity presents, and I feel obliged to ensure that these funds would be invested and managed in accordance with the wishes of the benefactor, Mrs. Berat.

To further discuss the execution of the will and the subsequent steps, it appears prudent to validate the authenticity of the document as well as the legal procedures involved. I believe it would be mutually beneficial to set up a secure channel of communication with you, perhaps through a voice call or video conference, to discuss the details more thoroughly.

I kindly request that you provide me with the contact details of the bank hosting the deposited sum in BDO Chartered Bank Philippines, as I would like to initiate contact for confirming the necessary details and procedures regarding the transferring of the funds.

Moreover, in order to proceed with due diligence, could you also send me the credentials, such as your professional license or identification, along with a direct contact number to authenticate our dialogue?

Rest assured, I am taking this matter with the seriousness it warrants and am eager to proceed in the most secure and efficient manner possible. Your guidance in navigating the intricacies of international inheritance laws will be invaluable in this regard.

I await your prompt response to move forward with the necessary procedures and to honor the wishes of Mrs. Berat to the fullest extent.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Format the following text properly, for storytelling purposes.

As I sit in my bedroom, in a house I am on the verge of bidding goodbye to after nearly two decades, it is hard to avoid reflecting on the elements within while I write these words. It has become a monument to the past, a museum frozen in time that continues to operate though its visitation has been reduced to myself, Honey, and the occasional special guest. Surrounded by multiple VCRs, old desktops and laptops, and other aged curiosities in addition to the usual self-care products, I realize I am not only curator of the museum but an exhibit in and of myself. In a world that resembles The Terminator far more than it does Leave It to Beaver, I am an analog man at a crossroads, trying to learn more about the digital future awaiting us all while treading with caution. Each day is a reminder of my mortality and vulnerability, and in the context of all that has happened since my childhood, it is remarkable to think that so many of the people I looked up to and were influenced by growing up have either passed away or are getting up in years. Looking back at those who were prevalent in my youth, I acknowledge the power of time to heal wounds, and the power of fate to inflict or make them worse. There are some believed innocent who were found guilty, others falsely accused who earned their vindication, many who reached the top of the mountain only to begin an inevitable slide down. I have come to realize what a challenge it truly is to be a feeling man in a world that has become more apathetic, a world where human beings have adopted a me-first mentality; though to a certain extent humans have always had to focus on taking care of their needs first/foremost (after all, self-preservation is humanity's first law) it has never been as blatantly prevalent in society as it is now. I have had people tell me that I am too nice, too apologetic, too concerned...and while it would be very easy for me to become a practitioner of the same apathy that dominates this world, I would rather be the flip side of the coin. It is harder to be an exception than a rule, but ultimately, I know I am holding onto my individuality. To obey and consume is the order of the day; many humans walk around like chickens with their heads cut off, aimlessly wandering from one thing to the next, chasing ambitions that may benefit them financially but will provide them no mental, emotional, or spiritual sustenance. Second-guessing their powers of perception, their inherent capabilities for discernment and decision-making, they have put their brains on autopilot. Recognizing how the momentum shifted from common-sense morals and self-respect to "do what thou wilt", I imagine Aleister Crowley beaming with pride, seeing how many subscribe to philosophies he had vehemently advocated. Humankind, it seems, is collectively sowing seeds of sin by which they manifest their destruction. Realizing that only a few will survive what is coming, I battle not only the temptations of this world but my very self. It is an unfortunate truth that we cannot help or heal everyone, and particularly if we haven't done our own self-healing first. As a child, I envisioned myself as a superhero, gifted through destiny and discipline with the power to save the world. In my own little corner of the universe, I feel duty-bound to be there for those who have helped me through the process of picking myself up, getting back on my feet, and trying again. The pink and green striped wallpaper in my room, faded and partially dilapidated with the passage of time, reflects the temporal nature of human experience, of existence. The art print hanging above my computer setup with its lush mountain scenery, sparkling waters and healthy, strong trees reflects the beauty of nature, an ideal way of life that was once the norm for most, but which itself is now fading too. Every sticker, every handwritten phrase, every cord, the rapidly pulsating orange light on an old, reliable power strip, tells not only of who I am but who I once was. I am someone else, yet still myself. I am somewhere else, yet still here.
